objects.description: [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has obtained access to commercial VPN services to launch malicious activity.(Citation: Check Point VOID MANTICORE Handala Hack March 2026)(Citation: SPECOPS Outpost24 Handala Hack Stryker March 2026) [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has also leveraged Starlink internet services.(Citation: Check Point VOID MANTICORE Handala Hack March 2026) [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has used operator-controlled Telegram bots and channels as C2 infrastructure.(Citation: Domain Tools Handala Hack Karma Homeland Justice MOIS April 2026)
